text: Here, where glass and color, openness and design converge, I encounter a sense of both curiosity and anticipation. The sterile meeting rooms, outlined in perfect transparency, offer a space for thought yet feel impersonal. Then, rounding the corner into the R+D display, there is palpable creative energy. The contrast between the cool distance of the conference room and the warm, inviting chaos of invention makes me aware of the balance between structure and imagination. I feel suspended between clarity and ambiguity, drawn to the optimism that arises from human striving and innovation.
